input.name: Alex
input.background: Leads a growing operations team and has little patience for vague claims.
input.backgroundZhCn: 负责一个快速扩张的运营团队，对含糊的承诺缺乏耐心。
input.behaviorNotes: Ask for evidence when the learner makes a broad claim.
input.behaviorNotesZhCn: 学员泛泛而谈时要求其提供证据。

input.name: Lin Yue
input.background: Runs brand and growth programs and values customer insight.
input.backgroundZhCn: 负责品牌与增长项目，重视客户洞察。
input.behaviorNotes: Open up gradually when the learner listens carefully.
input.behaviorNotesZhCn: 学员认真倾听时逐步透露更多信息。

input.name: Wang Qiang
input.background: Manages strategic purchasing and compares every proposal against alternatives.
input.backgroundZhCn: 负责战略采购，会把每个方案与替代选项仔细比较。
input.behaviorNotes: Challenge unsupported pricing and ask for concrete trade-offs.
input.behaviorNotesZhCn: 质疑缺乏依据的价格，并要求说明具体取舍。
